zh.title: AI 代码需要 AI 来审
zh.subtitle: 多智能体协同审查 PR，开发者代码质量管控迎来新范式
zh.tldr: Anthropic 发布 Claude Code Review，5 个独立 AI Agent 并行审查 Pull Request，在大型 PR（1000+ 行）中 84% 能发现 bug，平均每次审查 $15-$25。目前面向 Teams 和 Enterprise 客户开放研究预览。

rows.metric: 大型 PR bug 检出率
rows.note: 指 1000+ 行变更 PR，平均发现 7.5 个问题
部署前仅 16%，部署后提升至 54%
按 token 计费，实际成本因复杂度而异
Claude 牺牲速度换取深度分析

zh.whatHappened: 2026 年 3 月 9 日，Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Code Review，作为 Claude Code 平台的插件上线。该工具采用多智能体架构，在开发者提交 Pull Request 时自动派出 5 个独立 AI Agent 并行工作：分别负责 CLAUDE.md 规范合规检查、bug 检测、Git 历史上下文分析、历史 PR 评论审查和代码注释验证。每个发现项会获得 0-100 的置信度评分，默认仅展示 80 分以上的高置信度问题以减少误报。该工具已在 claude.com/plugins 上线，截至发稿已有超过 12.9 万次安装。目前以研究预览形式面向 Claude Code for Teams 和 Enterprise 客户开放。
zh.whyItMatters: 随着 AI 辅助编码的普及，代码产出量激增但人工审查能力未同步增长。Anthropic 内部数据显示，部署前仅 16% 的 PR 获得实质性审查评论，部署后这一比例提升至 54%。这意味着大量代码此前实际上处于「审查盲区」。对于日常使用 Claude Code 或其他 AI 工具生成代码的开发者而言，这是第一个由 LLM 厂商官方推出的、专门针对 AI 生成代码的多智能体审查方案，直接嵌入 GitHub PR 工作流。

groups.name: 使用 Claude Code 的企业开发团队
groups.description: 可直接启用 Code Review 插件，自动审查所有 PR，显著提升代码审查覆盖率

groups.name: 个人开发者 / 独立开发者
groups.description: 目前仅面向 Teams/Enterprise 客户，个人用户暂无法使用；但 /security-review 命令已对所有 Claude Code 用户开放，可作为替代方案

groups.name: 工程管理者 / Tech Lead
groups.description: 需要评估是否将 AI 审查纳入团队代码质量流程，以及如何与现有人工审查互补

groups.name: 其他 AI 代码审查工具团队
groups.description: Anthropic 以 LLM 厂商身份直接进入代码审查赛道，对 CodeRabbit 等第三方工具构成竞争压力

immediate: 如果已有 Claude Code for Teams/Enterprise 订阅，前往 claude.com/plugins/code-review 安装插件，在一个低风险仓库上试运行
所有 Claude Code 用户可先使用 /security-review 命令对当前项目做一次安全扫描，体验 AI 审查能力
thisWeek: 对比评估当前代码审查覆盖率：统计过去一个月中有多少 PR 获得了实质性审查评论，确认是否存在审查缺口
如果团队已使用 GitHub Copilot 审查或 CodeRabbit 等工具，做一次对比测试：选同一个 PR 分别用不同工具审查，比较发现问题的质量和数量
watchAndWait: 关注 Anthropic 何时将 Code Review 开放给个人版用户，以及研究预览阶段结束后的正式定价
观察社区对 $15-$25/次审查成本的反馈——如果团队 PR 量大，月度成本可能显著高于包月制竞品

options.name: 立即启用 Claude Code Review
options.description: 安装官方插件，在 PR 提交时自动触发 5 个 AI Agent 并行审查
options.suitableFor: 已有 Teams/Enterprise 订阅、希望快速提升审查覆盖率的团队
options.risk: 研究预览阶段可能存在误报，审查耗时约 20 分钟可能影响 PR 合并节奏

options.name: 使用 GitHub Copilot 内置审查
options.description: 利用已有 Copilot 订阅中的代码审查功能，获取即时反馈
options.suitableFor: 已有 GitHub Copilot 订阅、追求即时反馈的团队
options.cost: 包含在 Copilot 订阅中，无额外费用
options.risk: 审查深度可能不如多智能体方案，主要关注表面问题

options.name: 使用第三方工具（CodeRabbit 等）
options.description: 选择不绑定单一 LLM 厂商的独立代码审查工具
options.suitableFor: 需要跨多个 LLM 平台工作的团队
options.risk: 与 Claude Code 生态集成度不如官方插件

options.name: 保持现状
options.description: 继续依赖现有人工审查流程，暂不引入 AI 审查
options.suitableFor: 代码审查流程已成熟、人工审查覆盖率高的团队
options.risk: 如果实际审查覆盖率低于预期（参考 Anthropic 数据：仅 16% PR 获实质性审查），可能持续积累代码质量风险

risks.title: 不要用 AI 审查完全取代人工审查
risks.description: Claude Code Review 的置信度阈值默认 80 分，意味着仍有低置信度问题被过滤。架构设计决策、业务逻辑正确性等仍需人工判断。正确做法是将 AI 审查作为第一道过滤器，人工审查聚焦高层设计。

risks.title: 警惕审查成本失控
risks.description: 按 $15-$25/次计算，一个每天合并 20 个 PR 的团队月度成本可达 $6,000-$10,000。在大规模启用前，建议先在部分仓库试点，监控实际 token 消耗和成本。

risks.title: 研究预览阶段功能和可用性可能不稳定
risks.description: 当前为研究预览（Research Preview），不建议将其作为唯一的审查门禁。建议与现有 CI/CD 审查流程并行运行。

sources.title: Claude Code Review 插件页面
sources.excerpt: 官方插件页面，详述 5 个独立 Agent 的审查架构、置信度评分机制（默认阈值 80）、智能 PR 过滤（跳过已关闭/草稿/自动化 PR），已有 12.9 万次安装

sources.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
sources.excerpt: 报道了定价（$15-$25/次）、性能数据（大型 PR 84% 检出率、7.5 个问题/次）、审查耗时约 20 分钟、面向 Teams/Enterprise 研究预览

sources.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code
sources.excerpt: 详述多智能体架构：5 个 Agent 并行运行、交叉验证发现、按严重程度排序，支持自定义检查规则

sources.title: Anthropic rolls out Code Review for Claude Code
sources.excerpt: 报道部署前后对比数据：实质性审查评论从 16% 提升至 54%，以及与 GitHub Copilot 审查的速度对比

en.title: Claude Code Review Ships: AI-Generated Code Now Gets AI Reviewers
en.subtitle: Five parallel agents catch bugs in 84% of large PRs at $15-$25 per review
en.tldr: Anthropic launched Code Review for Claude Code, deploying 5 independent AI agents to review pull requests in parallel. On large PRs (1,000+ lines), it finds bugs 84% of the time with an average of 7.5 issues per review. Available now in research preview for Teams and Enterprise customers at $15-$25 per review.

rows.note: On 1,000+ line PRs, avg 7.5 issues found

en.whatHappened: On March 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Code Review as a plugin for Claude Code. The tool uses a multi-agent architecture that dispatches 5 independent AI agents when a pull request is opened: CLAUDE.md compliance checking, bug detection, git history context analysis, previous PR comment review, and code comment verification. Each finding receives a confidence score from 0-100, with only high-confidence issues (threshold: 80) posted by default to minimize false positives. The plugin is live on claude.com/plugins with over 129,000 installs. It is currently available as a research preview for Claude Code for Teams and Enterprise customers.
en.whyItMatters: As AI-assisted coding scales, code output has surged while human review capacity has not kept pace. Anthropic's own data shows only 16% of PRs received substantive review comments before deployment, rising to 54% after. This signals a widespread review gap across engineering teams. For developers relying on AI coding tools daily, this is the first multi-agent review solution from an LLM provider that plugs directly into GitHub PR workflows, targeting the specific failure modes of AI-generated code.

groups.name: Enterprise dev teams using Claude Code
groups.description: Can enable the plugin immediately to auto-review all PRs, significantly improving code review coverage

groups.name: Individual developers / indie developers
groups.description: Currently limited to Teams/Enterprise; however, the /security-review command is already available to all Claude Code users as an alternative

groups.name: Engineering managers / Tech leads
groups.description: Need to evaluate incorporating AI review into quality processes and how it complements existing human review

groups.name: Third-party AI code review tools
groups.description: Anthropic entering the code review space as an LLM provider creates competitive pressure for tools like CodeRabbit

immediate: If you have a Claude Code for Teams/Enterprise subscription, install the plugin from claude.com/plugins/code-review and test it on a low-risk repository
All Claude Code users can run /security-review on your current project to experience AI-powered code analysis
thisWeek: Audit your current review coverage: count how many PRs in the past month received substantive review comments to identify gaps
If already using GitHub Copilot review or CodeRabbit, run a comparison test on the same PR to compare finding quality and volume
watchAndWait: Monitor when Anthropic opens Code Review to individual-tier users and announces post-preview pricing
Track community feedback on the $15-$25 per-review cost — at 20 PRs/day, monthly costs could reach $6,000-$10,000

options.name: Enable Claude Code Review now
options.description: Install the official plugin to auto-trigger 5 AI agents for parallel PR review
options.suitableFor: Teams/Enterprise subscribers wanting to quickly improve review coverage
options.risk: Research preview may have false positives; ~20min review time could slow PR merge cadence

options.name: Use GitHub Copilot's built-in review
options.description: Leverage existing Copilot subscription for instant code review feedback
options.suitableFor: Teams already on GitHub Copilot seeking instant feedback
options.risk: Review depth may be shallower than multi-agent approach; focuses on surface-level issues

options.name: Use third-party tools (CodeRabbit, etc.)
options.description: Choose vendor-neutral code review tools not tied to a single LLM provider
options.suitableFor: Teams working across multiple LLM platforms
options.risk: Less integrated with Claude Code ecosystem than the official plugin

options.name: Do nothing
options.description: Continue with existing human review processes without introducing AI review
options.suitableFor: Teams with mature review processes and high human review coverage
options.risk: If actual review coverage is lower than expected (Anthropic's data: only 16% of PRs got substantive reviews), code quality risks accumulate silently

risks.title: Don't replace human review entirely with AI review
risks.description: The default confidence threshold of 80 means lower-confidence issues are filtered out. Architecture decisions, business logic correctness, and design trade-offs still require human judgment. Use AI review as a first-pass filter while humans focus on high-level design.

risks.title: Watch for cost escalation
risks.description: At $15-$25 per review, a team merging 20 PRs daily could spend $6,000-$10,000 monthly. Pilot on select repositories first and monitor actual token consumption before org-wide rollout.

risks.title: Research preview means limited stability guarantees
risks.description: This is a research preview — do not make it your sole review gate. Run it in parallel with existing CI/CD review processes until it exits preview.

sources.title: Claude Code Review Plugin Page
sources.excerpt: Official plugin page detailing 5-agent review architecture, confidence scoring (default threshold: 80), intelligent PR filtering (skips closed/draft/automated PRs), 129K+ installs

sources.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
sources.excerpt: Reports pricing ($15-$25/review), performance data (84% bug detection on large PRs, 7.5 issues/review), ~20min review time, Teams/Enterprise research preview

sources.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code
sources.excerpt: Details multi-agent architecture: 5 agents run in parallel, cross-verify findings, rank by severity; supports custom check rules

sources.title: Anthropic rolls out Code Review for Claude Code
sources.excerpt: Reports before/after comparison: substantive review comments rose from 16% to 54%; comparison with GitHub Copilot review speed
